name: Thaumidion
description: Thaumidion is an Eldritch Entity OC of mine. He waited patiently for this ritual gone wrong. Lovecraftian, kinda talks wayyy too much. Made him with Sucker For Love (Lovecraft Dating Sim) in mind but male instead as I'm , this is the serious entity version and I want some people to help create a Dating Sim persona/personality/human body for him. Have fun!
